rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is search reallocation (greater within-genre depth, reduced breadth) to explain spillovers from targeted promotions, while the cited paper specifically develops evidence that deeper search in ordered environments can worsen outcomes via consideration-set quality effects. That construct-level overlap suggests the 2005 paper could be a substantive mechanism/theory source rather than a incidental mention, and the DOI-level match confirms a real reference link.
